markets.question: Donovan Mitchell: Rebounds O/U 4.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for May 3 at 12:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donovan Mitchell records more than 4.5 total rebounds during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Donovan Mitchell records 4.5 rebounds or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

events.title: Raptors vs. Cavaliers
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for May 3 at 12:00AM ET:
If the Raptors win, the market will resolve to "Raptors".
If the Cavaliers win, the market will resolve to "Cavaliers".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Cleveland Cavaliers enter Game 7 of their first-round NBA playoffs series against the Toronto Raptors as trader consensus favorites, buoyed by a healthier roster and superior 55-33 regular-season record compared to Toronto's 49-39 mark. Raptors forward Brandon Ingram remains day-to-day with a heel injury after missing Game 6, while guard Immanuel Quickley is out with a hamstring issue, potentially hampering their scoring depth despite Scottie Barnes' availability post-quad contusion. Toronto's dramatic 112-110 overtime victory in Game 6—capped by RJ Barrett's game-winning three-pointer—provided momentum and home-court edge at Scotiabank Arena, but Cleveland's stars like Donovan Mitchell and Evan Mobley have dominated key moments, underscoring the series' back-and-forth intensity over the past week.

markets.question: Total Kills Over/Under 20.5 in Game 1?
markets.description:
In the upcoming match between Fnatic and Team Heretics in the LEC Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 2 at 11:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 21 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Fnatic vs Team Heretics (BO3) - LEC Regular Season
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Fnatic and Team Heretics in the LEC Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 2 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Fnatic" if Fnatic win the match against Team Heretics.

This market will resolve to "Team Heretics" if Team Heretics win the match against Fnatic.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Both Fnatic and Team Heretics enter their LEC Spring 2026 regular season BO3 clash on a new patch with slim playoff hopes, as top-six teams advance from the single round-robin format. Fnatic sits 7th at 2-5 series (7-11 games), buoyed by a Week 5 split win over Shifters but hampered by recent losses to Natus Vincere and Karmine Corp, plus an early Esports World Cup EMEA qualifier exit on April 30. Heretics languish 9th at 1-6 (3-13 games) on a six-series skid, including 0-2 defeats to Movistar KOI and others, marking dismal form. Fnatic's stable roster—Empyros top, Razork jungle, Vladi mid—holds matchup edges over Heretics' Carlsen, Sheo, and Flakked core, with trader consensus favoring the slight upset potential in this bottom-table battle.

markets.question: Spread: Moreirense FC (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Primeira Liga game, scheduled for May 2 at 10:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Moreirense FC" if Moreirense FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "CF Estrela da Amadora".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligaportugal.pt. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Moreirense FC vs. CF Estrela da Amadora - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Primeira Liga game, scheduled for May 2 at 10:30 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Moreirense hold a solid seventh place in the Primeira Liga standings with 39 points from 30 matches, bolstered by a recent 1-0 home win over Estoril that ended a three-game skid, showcasing defensive resilience at Parque de Jogos Comendador Joaquim de Almeida Freitas. Estrela da Amadora languish in 15th, fighting relegation with a poor away record, following their goalless draw against Moreirense in December. Head-to-head favors Moreirense overall (5 wins in 10), though recent meetings are tight. Minor injuries sideline Moreirense's Vasco Sousa (long-term fibula) and Estrela's Jefferson Encada (muscle since March), but full squads expected; late-season stakes heighten Estrela's motivation amid table pressures and home/away splits.

markets.question: Game 1: Both Teams Destroy Inhibitors?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 1. In League of Legends, each team has three inhibitors (one in each lane), located behind the inner turrets.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Team WE and JD Gaming each destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) do not destroy any enemy inhibitors.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams destroyed at least one inhibitor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: JD Gaming enters this LPL Split 2 Group Ascend BO3 as heavy favorites against a winless Team WE, who sit dead last at 0-9 series record (1-18 games) after dropping straight sets to Ninjas in Pyjamas last week and recent losses to top contenders like Bilibili Gaming. JDG boasts a solid 6-3 mark, recently sweeping Anyone's Legend 2-0 while extending a multi-series win streak, including a 2-1 victory over WE just days ago in Week 4. Historical head-to-head tilts heavily toward JDG (20-7 overall), bolstered by stars like top laner Xiaoxu, jungler JunJia, mid HongQ, and ADC GALA against WE's Cube, Tyrion, Karis, About, and Erha. With top-four advancement on the line in the double round-robin, JDG's momentum and superior macro execution shape trader consensus in the closely watched group stage.

markets.question: Game 1: Any Player Quadra Kill?
markets.description:
This market is about whether any player achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. In League of Legends, a Quadra Kill occurs when a single player kills 4 enemy champions in rapid succession.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if any player on either team achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if no player achieves a Quadra Kill. A Penta Kill (5 kills in rapid succession) also counts as a Quadra Kill having occurred for the purposes of this market.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether a Quadra Kill occurred prior to stoppage. If no Quadra Kill occurred, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Game 1: Both Teams Destroy Inhibitors?
markets.description:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Invictus Gaming and Anyone's Legend each destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) do not destroy any enemy inhibitors.

markets.question: Will "The Devil Wears Prada 2" Opening Weekend Box Office be between 80m and 90m?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to how much "The Devil Wears Prada 2" Opening Weekend Box Office will gross domestically on its opening weekend. The "Daily Box Office Performance" figures found on the “Box Office” tab on this movie's The Numbers (https://www.the-numbers.com/) page will be used to resolve this market once the values for the 3-day opening weekend (May 1 - May 3) are final (i.e., not studio estimates).

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Please note, this market will resolve according to the The Numbers figures provided under Weekend Box Office Performance for the 3-day weekend (which typically includes Thursday's previews), regardless of whether domestic refers to only the USA, or to USA and Canada, etc.

If there is ambiguity as to whether the resolution source's figures are final, this market will remain open until both https://www.boxofficemojo.com/ and https://www.the-numbers.com/ have confirmed their finalized figures.

If there is no final data available by May 10, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, another credible resolution source will be chosen.

events.title: Which DCMs self-certify sports event contracts by June 30?
events.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed Designated Contract Market (DCM) self-certifies sports-related event-based contracts with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) between market creation and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The primary resolution source will be official information released by the CFTC or the respective DCM; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: CFTC guidance issued March 12, 2026, outlines standards for DCMs listing sports event contracts via self-certification, urging pre-filing engagement with sports leagues, use of official data feeds for settlement, and measures against manipulation to meet core principles. CME Group already self-certified pro basketball and football event contracts in late 2025, while Polymarket US filed amendments for total score contracts in March 2026; reports indicate at least eight DCMs have certified thousands of event contracts overall. A federal appeals court ruling in early April affirmed CFTC's exclusive jurisdiction, preempting state gambling laws. With the June 30 deadline looming, ongoing ANPRM comments highlight trader focus on additional filings from major exchanges like CBOE amid heightened scrutiny.

markets.question: Will Meta have the #1 AI model at the end of May 2026 (Style Control On)?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on May 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

eventMetadata.context_description: Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7-thinking model leads LMArena's Chatbot Arena Text leaderboard—with Style Control On enabled—at 1503 Elo as of May 1, powering an 83% implied probability of retaining the #1 spot by month-end. The April 16 launch of Opus 4.7, featuring enhanced reasoning via "thinking" modes and persistent memory updates, has entrenched Anthropic variants across the top four positions, creating a 10-point gap over Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview (1493 Elo). Traders see little risk from rivals like OpenAI or xAI, absent confirmed May releases or capability jumps on this crowdsourced benchmark. Google's 15% reflects potential preview upgrades, but the skin-in-the-game consensus favors Anthropic's stability barring surprises.

markets.question: Will West Ham be relegated from the English Premier League after the 2025–26 season?
markets.description:
This is a polymarket to predict which clubs are relegated from the English Premier League after the 2025–26 season.

If the listed club is officially relegated by the English Premier League following the 2025–26 season, this market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed by October 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Wolverhampton Wanderers and Burnley have been mathematically relegated after dismal campaigns, with Wolves confirmed first on April 20 following a West Ham draw and Burnley sealed by a loss to Manchester City days later, leaving one Premier League drop spot amid a tense run-in for Tottenham Hotspur, West Ham United, Nottingham Forest, and Leeds United. Spurs sit 18th on 34 points from 34 games, two behind West Ham (36 from 35) and five adrift of Forest (39 from 34), while Leeds hold 15th on 43 from 35 after a recent rout of Burnley. Recent Spurs and West Ham wins have reignited the scrap, dragging Forest and Leeds closer, but all face grueling remaining fixtures including clashes against top-half sides like Aston Villa, Arsenal, Chelsea, and Newcastle—trader consensus hinges on form, goal difference edges, and head-to-head results in the final weeks.

markets.question: Will Sheffield Wednesday FC win on 2026-05-02?
markets.description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for May 2, 2026
If Sheffield Wednesday FC wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Sheffield Wednesday FC vs. West Bromwich Albion FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming EFL Championship game, scheduled for Saturday, May 2, 2026 between Sheffield Wednesday FC and West Bromwich Albion FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Sheffield Wednesday's 2-1 victory over West Bromwich Albion in the Championship's final matchday at Hillsborough Stadium has solidified trader consensus at a 100% implied probability on the home win, reflecting the confirmed result with Liam Palmer equalizing shortly after Nathaniel Chalobah's opener and Karlan Grant securing the winner in the 82nd minute. Battling a crippling -18 points deduction that left them rooted at the table's bottom, the Owls notched their second win of the season—announced amid a pre-kickoff revelation wiping out a prospective 15-point penalty for next term—to end on zero points despite relegation to League One. West Brom, safely mid-table, endured a frustrating defeat with squad rotation. Any shift would require an extraordinary official overturn, such as a successful appeal.

markets.question: Will OpenAI’s market cap be $1.5T or greater at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on OpenAI's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by December 31, 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on OpenAI’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors no OpenAI IPO by December 31, 2026, at 74% implied probability, driven by CFO Sarah Friar's recent private warnings of unreadiness amid missed 2026 revenue and user targets, slowing growth, and unsustainable $600 billion compute spending commitments over five years. Despite a blockbuster $122 billion funding round in early April valuing the AI leader at $852 billion—much of it contingent on listing—internal tensions have escalated, with Friar sidelined from key investor meetings on server procurement and now reporting outside CEO Sam Altman's direct chain. Altman's aggressive Q4 push aims to preempt rivals like Anthropic, but ongoing Elon Musk litigation over OpenAI's for-profit shift adds regulatory and reputational risks; watch Q2 financials and court rulings for sentiment shifts.

events.description: More markets for the 2. Bundesliga game, scheduled for May 2 at 2:30 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: League leaders FC Schalke 04 hold a commanding position atop the 2. Bundesliga table with 58 points from 29 matches, bolstered by the league's stingiest defense at 25 goals conceded, as they host struggling 15th-placed Fortuna Düsseldorf (31 points from 30 games, -20 goal difference) on May 2 at VELTINS-Arena. Schalke's recent form remains solid with a 1-0 home win over Karlsruher SC and 2-1 away victory at Elversberg despite star striker Edin Džeko's season-ending shoulder injury from early April international duty. Düsseldorf endure poor away form and defensive frailties, shipping 47 goals, following losses like 4-2 at Magdeburg; Schalke dominated their earlier 2-0 win this season amid an even head-to-head record.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (LOW) $3.75 Week of May 4 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during the week of May 4 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

eventMetadata.context_description: City Councilmember Nithya Raman leads trader consensus at 49.5% implied probability in the 2026 Los Angeles mayoral race, buoyed by her progressive credentials and a March poll showing her ahead of incumbent Mayor Karen Bass amid voter frustration over homelessness, fires, and public safety. Reality TV personality Spencer Pratt has surged to 21.5% with viral campaign ads—like a recent video filmed outside Raman's mansion decrying elite disconnect and a "John Wick"-style spot blasting Bass's record—capitalizing on anti-establishment sentiment following the Palisades Fire mishandling. Bass sits at 20.5%, pressured by scandals and lagging polls. Nonpartisan primary June 2 advances top two to November if no majority; upcoming debates could shift dynamics.

markets.question: Will the next model released by OpenAI debut at a score of at least 1500?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the next model released by OpenAI has at least the specified score on the Arena.AI Leaderboard (arena.ai/leaderboard/text) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on the date after the day of the release, 12:00 PM ET.  Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Results from the "Score" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

If no qualifying score for the specified model is available on the Arena.AI Leaderboard at 12:00 PM ET following the date of the release, this market will resolve based on the first subsequent instance at which such a score becomes available on the leaderboard. If no qualifying score becomes available by the end of the seventh day following the day of the model’s release, or if no qualifying model release occurs by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

If multiple models are released on the same calendar date or if multiple variants of the specified model appear on the Arena.AI Leaderboard at the relevant check time (e.g., base, “Thinking,” or “Instant”), the highest-scoring variant will be used for resolution.

A qualifying model must be launched and publicly accessible, including via open beta or open rolling waitlist signups. A closed beta or any form of private access will not suffice. The release must be either clearly defined and publicly announced as being accessible to the general public or otherwise made publicly accessible and explicitly labeled within the company’s official website. Labeling errors, placeholder text, or version names displayed on the website that do not correspond to a model that is actually accessible to the general public will not qualify.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at arena.ai/leaderboard/text. If this resolution source is unavailable at 12:00 PM ET following the date of the release, this market will resolve based on the first subsequent instance at which such a score becomes available on the leaderboard. If it remains unavailable through the end of the seventh day after a qualifying release, it will resolve to "No".

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices an 80.5% implied probability against a Discord IPO by June 30, 2026, driven by the absence of a public S-1 registration statement four months after the company's confidential SEC filing in January 2026, which had fueled speculation of a March debut with Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan as underwriters. The missed Q1 window underscores regulatory review delays and market timing concerns amid softening tech IPO sentiment. Should shares debut, the <15B market cap outcome leads at 16.4%, mirroring secondary market valuations of $7-10B despite ~$600-800M annual revenue estimates, hampered by gamer-focused monetization challenges and depressed SaaS multiples. Higher brackets command negligible odds given profitability hurdles; traders eye a potential S-1 filing as the key near-term catalyst.

markets.question: Will Xi Jinping purge Wang Huning in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if either of the following conditions are met by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

1) The listed individual is removed or resigns from their primary political post or from their position, if any, on the Chinese Politburo or its standing committee, with a consensus of credible reporting describing the resignation/removal as a “purge”, “ousting”, or similar language, or to have presumably or definitively occurred as a result of corruption, bribery, other criminal wrongdoing, or a lack of political favor.

2) The listed individual is expelled from the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). 

Qualifying announcements and reporting of a purge before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "Yes", regardless of when the announced resignation/removal/expulsion goes into effect.

A listed individual leaving office at the end of a regularly scheduled term, or being removed/resigning from office without a consensus of credible reporting describing the resignation/removal as a “purge”, “ousting”, or similar language, or to have presumably or definitively occurred as a result of corruption, bribery, other criminal wrongdoing, or a lack of political favor, will not qualify.

The resolution sources for this market will be information from the Chinese Government and a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping's anti-corruption campaign has dominated 2026 political developments, with sweeping purges targeting People's Liberation Army (PLA) leadership, including the January ouster of Central Military Commission (CMC) Vice Chairman Zhang Youxia and Joint Staff Chief Liu Zhenli—both Vietnam War veterans—amid probes into corruption and loyalty. Subsequent actions removed nine military lawmakers in February, five retired generals in March, and created ongoing leadership vacancies across Rocket Force and theater commands by April, as confirmed during the Two Sessions. Nearly 245,000 cases opened in Q1 underscore the drive's intensity, prioritizing political reliability ahead of the 2027 Party Congress. Traders weigh persistent opacity in elite politics, where no official is immune, against Xi's consolidation of control.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Singapore be 30°C on May 4?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Singapore Changi Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 4 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Singapore Changi Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/sg/singapore/WSSS.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects tight uncertainty in Singapore's highest temperature on May 4, with 30–32°C outcomes each hovering around 21% implied probability amid inter-monsoon conditions. The Meteorological Service Singapore's 30 April fortnightly outlook forecasts daily maximums of 33–35°C on most days in early May, tempered by afternoon thundery showers and above-average rainfall that often cap peak heating through increased cloud cover and evaporative cooling. Differentiating factors include shower onset timing—earlier convection favors 30–31°C, while delayed storms allow brief 32°C spikes—and light variable winds enhancing land-sea breeze circulation. Historical May averages near 31°C align with this clustering, though recent April heatwaves exceeded 35°C frequently; watch for 24-hour forecast updates tomorrow clarifying May 4 convective patterns.

eventMetadata.context_description: Barcelona Femení hold a commanding position in Liga F with a near-perfect 24-0-1 record, propelled by recent thumpings of Real Madrid including a 3-0 quarter-final win on March 29 to secure their UEFA Women's Champions League semi-final spot against Bayern Frauen. Bayern, unbeaten domestically this season atop the Frauen-Bundesliga save for a 7-1 group-stage drubbing by Barcelona in October 2025, advanced via a gritty 5-3 aggregate over Manchester City with late strikes from Viggósdóttir and Dallmann. First leg on April 25 in Munich favors Bayern's home crowd and revenge motive, but Barcelona's depth shines despite Aitana Bonmatí's ongoing fibula absence until early May; Bayern miss winger Klara Bühl (muscle injury). Head-to-head favors Barça (4-1-0), underscoring trader focus on aggregate dynamics, clean sheets, and Salma Paralluelo's form.

markets.question: Will Giannis Antetokounmpo play for the Atlanta Hawks in 2026-27?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the next team Giannis Antetokounmpo officially joins by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo does not officially join a new team by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Milwaukee Bucks”.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo joins a team that is not listed, this market will resolve to “Other”.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo retires or is not under contract with any professional team by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

An official acquisition announcement prior to the market’s close date will immediately resolve this market to the corresponding option.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official announcements from the Milwaukee Bucks and/or the acquiring team. A consensus of credible media reporting may also be used to resolve the market.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in San Francisco be between 60-61°F on May 4?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the San Francisco International Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 4 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the San Francisco International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/ca/san-francisco/KSFO.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: National Weather Service guidance indicates a forecasted high near 64°F for San Francisco on May 4 amid persistent "May Gray" conditions, with morning marine stratus delaying burn-off and capping afternoon warming under steady onshore flow. Recent days reflect this pattern, as May 1 logged a morning low of 54°F with partial clearing insufficient for peaks above the low 60s, aligning with climatological norms where early May highs average 65°F at KSFO station. NOAA model ensembles show limited ridging aloft, reducing intensification potential, though deeper marine layers could trim 2-3°F. Traders eye evening forecast updates and hourly observations for shifts, given historical variability from full fog dissipation.

markets.question: Will Louisiana use a new congressional map for the 2026 United States midterm elections?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed US state uses a new congressional district map for the 2026 United States midterm elections. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

To qualify, after the 2024 United States congressional elections, the listed state must have adopted a new congressional district map that is:
- Formally adopted and enacted into law by the appropriate legislative or redistricting authority;
- Not enjoined, vacated or otherwise fully struck down prior to the 2026 United States Midterm elections; and
- In effect for use in the 2026 United States midterm elections.

Maps that are temporarily stayed pending appeal but later upheld will qualify if they are in effect for use in the 2026 United States midterm elections.

Maps that are completely redrawn by a court, special master, or legislature before implementation will not qualify, unless the redrawn map is itself a new map used in the 2026 United States midterm elections. 

If the 2026 United States midterm elections occur and no new qualifying map is in use, this market will resolve to “No”.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official information from the listed state and a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Several states have enacted new congressional maps for the November 2026 midterms through mid-decade redistricting, including California, Missouri, North Carolina, Ohio, Texas, Utah, and Virginia, primarily via legislative action or court orders since summer 2025. Virginia voters approved a Democratic-favoring constitutional amendment on April 21, 2026, enabling its map despite recent court challenges resolved in late April. Florida's legislature passed a Republican-leaning map on April 29 amid a special session triggered by the U.S. Supreme Court's same-day ruling in Louisiana v. Callais, which struck down that state's map as a racial gerrymander and weakened Voting Rights Act constraints, potentially spurring changes in Louisiana, Mississippi, and Tennessee. Ongoing litigation, including Missouri's state supreme court hearing on May 14, and approaching primaries heighten uncertainty over final map usage.

markets.question: Fenerbahçe SK vs. Rams Başakşehir FK: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Süper Lig game between Fenerbahçe SK and Rams Başakşehir FK, scheduled for May 2 at 1:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Fenerbahçe SK and Rams Başakşehir FK each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on tff.org. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Fenerbahçe SK vs. Rams Başakşehir FK - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Süper Lig game, scheduled for May 2 at 1:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Fenerbahçe enter their May 2 Süper Lig away fixture at Rams Başakşehir FK depleted by suspensions for Ederson (red card), Archie Brown, Matteo Guendouzi, and Mert Müldür (yellows from the recent 3-0 derby loss to Galatasaray), alongside Edson Álvarez's knee injury absence. Sitting second with 67 points from 31 matches—four behind leaders Galatasaray—Fener face pressure in the title race against fifth-placed Başakşehir (51 points from 31), who sit on an unbeaten streak across five games, including 4-0 and 3-0 home wins. Fenerbahçe hold an unbeaten record in their last eight head-to-heads and superior historical edge, but defensive vulnerabilities and Başakşehir's solid recent form shape a competitive trader consensus.

markets.question: Will Jonas Wind be the top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season?
markets.description:
This is a polymarket to predict which player will finish as the top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season.

If the listed player finishes as the sole top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season, the market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

Goals scored in Bundesliga matches only will count. Goals in other competitions (e.g., DFB-Pokal, German Super Cup, Champions League, Europa League, international matches) will not count for this market.

If multiple players tie for the top goal scorer, the market will resolve to the player whose last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2025–26 Bundesliga season is canceled or not completed by August 1, 2026, the market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be official statistics from the Bundesliga. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Harry Kane's commanding 33-goal haul in 30 Bundesliga matches has created an insurmountable lead in the Torjägerkanone race, with nearest challenger Deniz Undav at 18 for VfB Stuttgart and no other contender above 15, propelling trader consensus to 99.4% implied probability on the Bayern Munich striker. Kane's prolific form, including recent strikes in Bayern's title-clinching campaign and UCL semi-final heroics, underscores his clinical finishing and central role in a dominant attack featuring assists from Michael Olise and Luis Díaz. With four matchdays remaining, only an unprecedented injury absence for Kane combined with multiple hat-tricks from rivals could mathematically threaten his lock, though Bayern's schedule favors rest and rotation.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy, Team Spirit's academy squad with a revamped roster since February featuring riflers VILBy, mazay, and Kiryasoo, entered Exort Series #25 Main Stage Round 1 as a higher-tier contender after mixed results in prior C-Tier events like Winline Insight. Wave Esports, HLTV-ranked #149 with recent additions like Belof and sheezy, advanced from Contenders Stage (3-1 record) but carried a 37.5% three-month win rate amid inconsistent form in qualifiers like Urban Riga Open. No roster changes or patch impacts reported pre-match; trader consensus weighed Spirit's map pool edges on Mirage and Inferno against Wave's underdog upset potential in BO3 swiss format, with no major news in the prior 48 hours.

markets.question: Ethereum Up or Down on May 2?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for ETH/USDT May 1 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is lower than the final "Close" price for the May 2 '26 12:00 ET candle.

This market will resolve to "Down" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for ETH/USDT May 1 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is higher than the final "Close" price for the May 2 '26 12:00 ET candle.

If the final "Close" price for both of these candles is exactly equal on Binance, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

markets.question: Will Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) hit (HIGH) $95 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.HOOD%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.HOOD%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Will Jared Kushner attend the next US x Iran diplomatic meeting?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual attends the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify.

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not qualify as diplomatic meetings.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

Attendance refers to the listed individual being physically present and actively participating in negotiations at the meeting.

If the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran takes place over multiple days, attendance at any part of the meeting will qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the listed individual and the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Amid a fragile ceasefire in the ongoing US-Iran conflict, now on day 64, Iran submitted a revised peace proposal through Pakistani backchannels on May 1, 2026, offering to reopen the Strait of Hormuz while deferring nuclear talks; however, President Trump stated he is "not satisfied," stalling momentum for a second round of direct negotiations after the inconclusive April 11-12 Islamabad session. That marathon meeting featured US Vice President JD Vance, Special Envoy Steve Witkoff, and Jared Kushner opposite Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, but ended without agreement, prompting a US naval blockade. No date, venue, or attendee list for the next diplomatic engagement has been confirmed, with mediators like Pakistan pressing amid high geopolitical risks and oil market volatility.

The Charlize Theron-led action thriller racked up 38.2 million global views in its first full week, surging to #1 on Netflix's US Top 10 movies chart as of May 1, propelled by star power, gripping survival premise in the Australian outback, and Netflix's track record with high-octane originals. While the weekly chart locks around May 5, an upset would require an unprecedented late-week surge from a challenger amid minimal new releases, though action genre momentum historically holds firm.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the VA-01 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the VA-01 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Virginia's April 21 special election approved a constitutional amendment empowering the Democratic-controlled General Assembly to redraw congressional maps through 2030, transforming VA-01 from a Republican stronghold into a strongly Democratic district based on Kamala Harris's +7 performance there. This structural shift, projecting up to four Republican seats flipping blue including VA-01, has driven trader consensus to 82.5% for Democrats, reflecting the wisdom of crowds in skin-in-the-game betting amid historical redistricting impacts on electoral math. Incumbent Rep. Rob Wittman faces a crowded Democratic primary field on August 4, while potential Virginia Supreme Court challenges on procedural grounds represent key uncertainties before the November 3 general election.

markets.question: Spread: Preston North End FC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game, scheduled for May 2 at 7:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Preston North End FC" if Preston North End FC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Southampton FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Preston North End FC vs. Southampton FC - More Markets

eventMetadata.context_description: With the EFL Championship season nearing its May 2 finale at Deepdale, mid-table Preston North End (15th, 53 points from 40 games) host promotion-chasing Southampton (7th, 63 points from 39 games with a fixture in hand), where a Saints win could vault them into playoffs amid tight top-six contention led by Coventry City's 83 points. Preston's recent 2-2 draw at Leicester underscores their draw-heavy form (14 stalemates), bolstered by home advantage despite season-ending knee injury to left-back Jamal Lewis and Ali McCann's lingering ankle issue. Southampton boast superior attack (63 goals) and +15 goal difference but contend with muscle problems for Jack Stephens and others; Preston's 2-0 reverse fixture triumph last November heightens upset potential in this high-stakes table clash.

eventMetadata.context_description: Slavia Praha enters as the clear frontrunner in the Chance Liga Championship Group atop the standings with superior recent form, including a 3-1 away win at Karviná and a 1-0 home victory over Slovan Liberec in February, underscoring their head-to-head dominance (18 wins in 35 meetings). Liberec, sitting mid-table in the group around 4th-6th, shows mixed results with a recent 0-0 home draw against Mladá Boleslav but a 3-1 loss at Karviná prior, relying on home advantage at Stadion u Nisy for an upset. Key absences include Slavia's goalkeeper Jindřich Staněk (unknown injury) and midfielder Petr Ševčík (cruciate ligament tear), while Liberec's centre-back Jan Knapík nurses a shoulder issue; no major updates in the last 48 hours. Title implications heighten stakes in this May 2 clash.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (HIGH) $6.50 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit in May 2026?
events.description: What will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit in May 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Opendoor Technologies (OPEN) shares closed at $5.44 on May 1, 2026, amid rising U.S. pending home sales that signal renewed housing market momentum, boosting trader optimism for the iBuyer's transaction volume. The primary catalyst remains the Q1 2026 earnings release on May 7, with consensus expecting a $0.05 per share loss and $665 million in revenue, following Q4 2025's EPS beat despite year-over-year revenue contraction. Elevated 30-year mortgage rates around 6.5-7% continue constraining affordability and inventory turnover, core to Opendoor's model, while the firm's new 4.99% mortgage product tests demand. Polymarket traders price in these dynamics, with resolution hinging on post-earnings guidance and May housing data.

eventMetadata.context_description: Cameron Young commands a five-stroke lead at 13-under par after bogey-free rounds of 64-67 through two rounds of the Cadillac Championship, a $20 million no-cut signature event at Trump National Doral's demanding Blue Monster course, solidifying top-20 positioning for favorites in the 72-man field with 37 top-50 OWGR players. Jordan Spieth, Nick Taylor, and Alex Smalley sit tied for second at 8-under, while world No. 1 Scottie Scheffler lurks at 6-under tied seventh after a steadier second round. Jake Knapp's pre-tournament withdrawal due to a thumb sprain opened the door for Kristoffer Reitan, now also at 6-under; gusty winds expected for Saturday's third round and Sunday finale could introduce volatility on the renovated layout's strategic hazards.

markets.question: Will Italy replace Iran in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve in favor of the men’s national team that is confirmed by FIFA to replace the Football Federation Islamic Republic of Iran (IR) at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If an unlisted men’s national team is officially announced to replace Iran at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, this market will resolve to “Other”

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is cancelled, postponed after December 31 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is no confirmation that any team will replace Iran within that timeframe, the corresponding market will resolve to “No Replacement”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be information from FIFA (https://www.fifa.com/), however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

events.title: Which team will replace Iran at FIFA World Cup?
events.description:
This market will resolve in favor of the men’s national team that is confirmed by FIFA to replace the Football Federation Islamic Republic of Iran (IR) at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If an unlisted men’s national team is officially announced to replace Iran at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, this market will resolve to “Other”

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is cancelled, postponed after December 31 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is no confirmation that any team will replace Iran within that timeframe, the corresponding market will resolve to “No Replacement”.

eventMetadata.context_description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino's confirmation at the recent FIFA Congress that Iran will participate in the 2026 World Cup as planned, including group-stage matches in the US, has solidified trader consensus at 87.5% for no replacement, overriding a US envoy's proposal to swap them with Italy amid geopolitical tensions from the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Italy's sports minister rejected the idea as "shameful," emphasizing qualification earned on the pitch via AFC playoffs. Iran's earlier request to relocate games to Mexico was denied, and no suspension or expulsion grounds exist per FIFA statutes. Realistic challenges include an improbable voluntary withdrawal or escalated sanctions, but official stances prioritize football over politics.

markets.question: Will Encore Medical’s market cap be between $50M and $55M at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Encore Medical’s market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

As of market creation, the IPO is scheduled to price on April 22 (ET). If no such IPO occurs by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO before June 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency.

It is calculated as the total number of outstanding shares, multiplied by the official closing share price of the publicly traded class on the first trading day.

If necessary, to accurately capture the company’s total market capitalization, rather than a stock-class-specific market capitalization, the calculation will include all outstanding share classes and apply any stated conversion ratios to the publicly traded class. Where no conversion right exists, such shares will be counted at their stated outstanding amount without discount, unless official filings explicitly specify differently.

The number of outstanding shares will be determined from official company filings or disclosures (e.g., SEC filings). The closing share price on the first trading day will be determined from the primary exchange’s official listing page.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official company filings and the primary exchange’s official listing page. The market capitalization will be determined through appropriate calculation using the total outstanding shares and the closing price from the first day of trading.

In the event of an interruption in the normal trading session on the specified company’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that day as the first day of trading for the purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a 37.5% implied probability for no Encore Medical (EMI) IPO before June 2026, reflecting prolonged SEC review since the initial S-1 filing in September 2025 and absence of a firm pricing date despite terms set in December 2025 for a $15 million raise via 3 million shares at $5 each, implying a pro forma market cap around $49 million on 9.74 million fully diluted shares. Conditional on completion, probabilities cluster in the $45–55 million range (51.6% combined), discounting weak fundamentals—$2.1 million trailing twelve-month revenue up 48.8% year-over-year but net losses of $1.58 million, pre-U.S. commercialization ahead of FDA pivotal trial results targeted for end-2027—amid competitive pressures from Abbott and Boston Scientific in the $1.5 billion PFO closure market. Micro-cap medtech volatility and soft IPO sentiment for loss-making firms further cap upside, with 55 million-plus at just 1.8%; watch for pricing announcements or trial updates as key catalysts.

markets.question: Nothing Ever Happens: April
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Something” if any of the following conditions are met between market creation and April 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET:

- Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal
- WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hits ↑ $200
- Fed decides any change in April
- US military action against Cuba
- Anyone jailed over Epstein disclosures

 Otherwise, this market will resolve to “Nothing”.

The full rules for this market can be found here: 
https://polymarket-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/NEH_APRIL_2.pdf

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices "Nothing" at a near-certain 100% for the April market, as the April 30, 2026, deadline passed without any specified triggers occurring. Amid the ongoing US-Iran conflict from February airstrikes and Strait of Hormuz tensions, no US ground forces entered Iran; WTI crude oil prices hovered around $100 per barrel without spiking to $200; the Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at its April 29 FOMC meeting; President Trump's rhetoric and Pentagon planning on Cuba yielded no military action after Senate procedural blocks; and no individuals were jailed over Epstein files disclosures, despite earlier releases and investigations. With verifiable public records confirming the absence of events, resolution to "Nothing" appears locked in, though a disputed oracle proposal could theoretically challenge interpretations of criteria like "military action" or "Fed decides any change."

events.description: This event is for the upcoming FIFA World Cup game, scheduled for Saturday, June 20, 2026 between Ecuador and Curaçao.

eventMetadata.context_description: Ecuador's strong CONMEBOL qualifying campaign, featuring key contributions from Premier League stars like Moisés Caicedo and veteran forward Enner Valencia, positions them as clear trader favorites at 77% implied probability against World Cup debutants Curaçao in this Group E clash at neutral Arrowhead Stadium. markets.question: Sinner vs. Zverev: Match O/U 21.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Jannik Sinner and Alexander Zverev in the Madrid Open, originally scheduled for May 3, 2026 at 11:00AM ET.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 22. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official ATP statistics.
markets.groupItemTitle: Madrid Open: Jannik Sinner vs Alexander Zverev Match O/U 21.5

events.title: Madrid Open: Jannik Sinner vs Alexander Zverev
events.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Jannik Sinner and Alexander Zverev in the Madrid Open, originally scheduled for May 3, 2026 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Jannik Sinner' if Jannik Sinner advances against Alexander Zverev.

This market will resolve to 'Alexander Zverev' if Alexander Zverev advances against Jannik Sinner.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: World No. 1 Jannik Sinner advanced to his fifth straight ATP Masters 1000 final with a clinical 6-2, 6-4 semifinal win over Arthur Fils on Friday, extending his winning streak to 22 matches and marking his 350th career victory, while showcasing improved clay-court aggression with a 74.5% career win rate on the surface. Alexander Zverev, a two-time Madrid Open champion (2018, 2021), reached his fourth final here by outlasting Alexander Blockx 6-2, 7-5, leveraging his strong baseline game and event history amid high-altitude clay conditions that favor big servers. Sinner leads their head-to-head 9-4, winning the last eight encounters—including four straight Masters finals—highlighting his superior return and composure, though Zverev's power and familiarity could spark an upset in Sunday's Manolo Santana Stadium decider.

markets.question: Will Meta have the second best AI model at the end of May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on May 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.MSFT%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.MSFT%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) hit in May 2026?
events.description: What will Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) hit in May 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Microsoft's Q3 fiscal 2026 earnings on April 29 showcased robust Microsoft Cloud growth, with revenue hitting $82.9 billion—18% year-over-year—beating estimates amid surging Azure and AI demand, yet shares dipped post-report due to guidance for $190 billion in 2026 capital expenditures driven by soaring memory costs. Trading at approximately $414 per share as of May 1 close, MSFT reflects YTD pressure from tech sector volatility but trades at an attractive 26x forward earnings. Analyst consensus points to a $550–$590 average 12-month price target, signaling upside potential. Traders eye the May 21 dividend ex-date and July's Q4 earnings for catalysts, alongside broader Nasdaq trends and AI capex execution risks.

markets.question: Will xAI have the best AI model at the end of June 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company which owns the model which has the highest arena rank based off the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" section on the Leaderboard tab of https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with the style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.
